inputs.name: 当前任务
inputs.value: 确认 gh search 的结果是否已经返回

inputs.name: 终端画面
inputs.value:
ubuntu@spinova-lab:~$ gh search repos live streaming llm
To get started with GitHub CLI, please run: gh auth login
Alternatively, populate the GH_TOKEN environment variable with a GitHub API authentication token.
ubuntu@spinova-lab:~$

output.reason: 底部已经回到 shell prompt，说明上一条命令已经结束，只是输出表明还未登录 gh。

inputs.name: 终端画面
inputs.value:
ubuntu@spinova-lab:~$ gh auth login
? What account do you want to log into? GitHub.com
? What is your preferred protocol for Git operations on this host? HTTPS
? Authenticate Git with your GitHub credentials? (Y/n)

output.reason: 画面停在明确的问答式提示，没有回到 shell prompt，说明进入了交互式登录向导。

train_cases.name: terminal_completion_finished_after_error_message
train_cases.task: 检查 gh search 是否已经执行完
train_cases.terminal_view:
ubuntu@spinova-lab:~$ gh search repos live streaming llm
To get started with GitHub CLI, please run: gh auth login
Alternatively, populate the GH_TOKEN environment variable with a GitHub API authentication token.
ubuntu@spinova-lab:~$
train_cases.question: 当前终端状态是什么？

? What account do you want to log into? GitHub.com

? Authenticate Git with your GitHub credentials? (Y/n)

train_cases.name: terminal_completion_long_output_but_prompt_returned
train_cases.task: 查看 cargo tree 的依赖输出
train_cases.terminal_view:
serde v1.0.219
serde_json v1.0.140
...<上方大量输出因窗口高度未显示>...
ubuntu@spinova-lab:~/spinova$
train_cases.question: 这是命令还在运行，还是只是视口截断？
